description: Update-VersionTag or fix_update_version.ps1 encountered dollar-subexpression in catch block at line 6972. Tool recursively pasted entire file content 7 times, inflating from 370KB to 296MB.
prevention: Never run regex tag replacement on lines containing dollar-subexpressions.
title: VersionTag tool corrupted Main-GUI.ps1 (296MB file duplication)
resolution: Recovered by merging v26 lines 1-6971 with v24 history catch + remainder. Backup at temp/Main-GUI-CORRUPTED-BACKUP-20260329-112707.ps1
